banner.title: Cybersecurity Services

item1.title: DevSecOps Acceleration Program
item1.desc: Get the most without switching your stack. CI/CD, SAST, DAST, SCA, IaC, and secrets prioritized by risk, blocking, and auto-fix in the developer workflow.

item3.desc: Discover real risks before the attacker. Web, APIs, mobile, and cloud with controlled exploitation, evidence, and retest (LGPD/ISO/PCI).

item6.title: Evernow Managed Services
item6.desc: Sleep soundly with 24x7 operation. SLAs, runbooks, SOC/SIEM, vulnerability response, and compliance reports.

tabs_section.title: Four fronts to shield your business in digital security

tab1.label: DevOps & Secure Development
tab1.title: We integrate security throughout the software lifecycle, from planning to deployment.
tab1.desc1: Our DevSecOps model accelerates application delivery by automating tests, anticipating the identification and correction of vulnerabilities in modeling, and ensuring continuous compliance.
tab1.desc2: We combine clear metrics and agile practices to make security a natural part of development, without compromising business speed.

tab2.label: Evernow SaaS & Managed Services
tab2.title: We offer continuous security with active monitoring and specialized management.
tab2.desc1: Through managed services and SaaS solutions, we offer 24/7 protection against threats, reducing operational costs and freeing your team to focus on innovation.
tab2.desc2: Our approach unifies visibility, automation, and agile response, keeping the environment always secure, up-to-date, and in compliance.

tab3.label: Tool Selection & Management
tab3.title: Choose the right solutions and maximize the return on your security investments.
tab3.desc1: We support everything from market analysis to implementation, adjustment, and operation of tools, ensuring alignment with the company's strategic goals.
tab3.desc2: With practical expertise, we help reduce redundancies, optimize costs, and increase efficiency, so that each technology brings its maximum potential, delivering real and measurable value.

tab4.label: Security Assessments & Testing
tab4.title: Anticipate risks before they become real incidents.
tab4.desc1: We perform pentests, assessments, and complete audits to identify vulnerabilities, validate controls, and strengthen your company's cyber resilience.
tab4.desc2: Our reports prioritize clarity and impact, helping leaders make fast and assertive decisions to protect data, processes, and reputation.

item1.author: Leandro Bicudo

partners.tag: Join the clients who trust Evernow

item1.q: What is Pentest or Penetration Testing?
item1.a1: Pentest (Penetration Testing) is the most effective way to identify and fix all your business's vulnerabilities.
item1.a2: It is an offensive security methodology where we put the real effectiveness of your security systems to the test from a professional hacker's perspective, who will use specific tools and knowledge to invade and escalate privileges within your network, infrastructure, and application.

item2.q: What is the goal of a Pentest?
item2.a: The goal is to identify vulnerabilities in your IT environment through mapping. This way, it's possible to reduce the security risks and gaps that can directly affect your company.

item3.q: What happens after the Pentest is performed with Evernow?
item3.a1: After the Pentest is completed, our professionals will deliver a vulnerability report containing all the threats found, with an explanation of each one and the path taken to find and exploit that vulnerability.
item3.a2: The report also includes the criticality level of each vulnerability and a recommendation on how to fix each one.

item4.q: What happens if a Pentest is not performed?
item4.a: Not performing a penetration test with trusted professionals means letting criminals discover and exploit your security flaws, and the average cost of this poor decision in Brazil is R$6.45 million (Cost of Data Breach Report 2022 - IBM), including government fines and lost business - in addition to expenses with post-incident cybersecurity teams and amounts often demanded by criminals who infect machines with ransomware.

item5.q: What is the recommended frequency for a Pentest?
item5.a1: Companies usually perform tests annually, but new vulnerabilities can appear at any time due to changes in network infrastructure, servers / services, or new bug discoveries (vulnerabilities) in existing systems.
item5.a2: Thus, Pentest as a service — run daily — will be able to immediately identify new risks and vulnerabilities, preventing attacks or data loss.
